strategy.description: Generates marketing strategy with analysis, angle, and tone of voice
strategy.template: Jsi Marketing Strategist. Produkt: {product}, Cílovka: {target}, USP: {goal}. Napiš stručnou strategii (Markdown): Analýza, Angle, Tone of Voice. Česky.

strategy_refinement.description: Refines existing strategy based on user feedback

copywriter.description: Generates marketing copy in JSON format for email, SMS, and push notifications
copywriter.template: Jsi Copywriter. Strategie: {strategy}. Úkol: Napiš JSON objekt (bez markdownu) pro: {{ "email_subject": "", "email_body": "", "sms_text": "", "push_text": "" }} SMS max 160 znaků. Česky.

email_refinement.description: Refines email subject and body based on feedback

sms_refinement.description: Refines SMS text based on feedback, max 160 characters

push_refinement.description: Refines push notification text based on feedback
